recommended_fix: Use parameterized queries and allowlisted input types.
root_cause: SQL-shaped input reached an API parameter. The endpoint returned 2xx, so this is likely a misconfiguration.
summary: /orders/get/country accepted suspicious SQL Injection shaped input with HTTP 200.
title: Input validation misconfiguration
zero_trust_action: Block or step-up matching requests, alert the API owner, and open a root-cause fix ticket.
